title: onosma neglecta
intro: Onosma neglecta, also known as Yellow Toadflax, is a perennial plant species in the borage family native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its content of iridoid glycosides and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Onosma neglecta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antibacterial activity. Herbal preparations of Onosma neglecta are typically made from the plant's flowers and leaves, which can be dried and infused in hot water or used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
